title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: EMEA deploys the world's most comprehensive crypto regulatory infrastructure this quarter as 21 EU events converge with 6 UK framework developments and accelerating Middle East licensing rollouts. MiCA's review consultation (deadline Aug 31) shapes the next generation of DeFi and NFT treatment while AMLA becomes operational with direct CASP supervision authority in Q3. Across 35 markets, the compliance window closes fast—French PSAN transitions end July 1, UK FCA sets firm authorisation deadline

regulators.full: European Commission / European Securities and Markets Authority / Anti-Money Laundering Authority
regulators.focus: MiCA implementation, AMLA launch, AML package, DORA, RTS adoption
